case_title: NOBLE FIELDS VS. PERRY VERMILVEA et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,726.60 FILED BY FIELDS, NOBLE AS TO DEFENDANT VERMILVEA, PERRY LAI, YULAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-08-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIELDS, NOBLE AS TO DEFENDANT LAI, YULAN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-07-2011, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT VERMILVEA, PERRY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-08-2011 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO SEP-22-2011 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PARTIE'S AGREE TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO DELETE PERRY VERMILVEA AS A DEFENDANT AND TO ADD AS A DEFENDANT, IN HOME SUPPORTIVE SERVICES CONSORTIUM.

DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF WILL PURSUE THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR IN SAN MATEO COUNTY SMALL CLAIMS COURT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
